name: VirusTotal v3
description: This app integrates with the VirusTotal cloud to implement investigative and reputation actions using v3 APIs

poll_interval.description: Number of minutes to poll for a detonation result (Default: 5)

waiting_time.description: Number of seconds to wait before polling for a detonation result (Default: 0)

rate_limit.description: Limit number of requests to 4 per minute

cache_expiration_interval.description: Number of seconds until cached reputation checks expire. Any other value than positive integer will disable caching (Default: 3600 seconds)

cache_size.description: Maximum number of entries in cache. Values of zero or less will not limit size and decimal value will be converted to floor value (Default: 1000)

example_values: Test data Domain Name: TEST.COM Registry Domain ID: 9999999999_DOMAIN_COM-VRSN Registrar WHOIS Server: whois.test.com Registrar URL: http://www.test.com Updated Date: 2021-02-17T07:07:07Z Creation Date: 2021-02-17T07:07:07Z Registry Expiry Date: 2022-02-17T07:07:07Z Registrar: Test Registrar, Inc. Registrar IANA ID: 9999 Registrar Abuse Contact Email:

actions.verbose: 'make request' action for the app. Used to handle arbitrary HTTP requests with the app's asset

http_method.name: http_method
http_method.description: The HTTP method to use for the request.

endpoint.name: endpoint
endpoint.description: Valid VirusTotal endpoint that will be appended to the end of the base url, https://www.virustotal.com/api/v3. An example of a valid endpoint is 'domains/example.com'.

headers.name: headers
headers.description: The headers to send with the request (JSON object). An example is {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}

query_parameters.name: query_parameters
query_parameters.description: Parameters to append to the URL (JSON object or query string). An example is ?key=value&key2=value2

body.name: body
body.description: The body to send with the request (JSON object). An example is {'key': 'value', 'key2': 'value2'}

timeout.name: timeout
timeout.description: The timeout for the request in seconds.

verify_ssl.name: verify_ssl
verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate. Default is False.

actions.description: Queries VirusTotal for file reputation info
Downloads a file from VirusTotal and adds it to the vault
Queries VirusTotal for URL info (run this action after running detonate url)
Load a URL to Virus Total and retrieve analysis results
actions.verbose:
detonate url will send a URL to Virus Total for analysis. Virus Total, however, takes an indefinite amount of time to complete this scan. This action will poll for the results for a short amount of time. If it cannot get the finished results in this amount of time, it will fail and in the summary it will return the scan id. This should be used with the get report action to finish the scan.
If you attempt to upload a URL which has already been scanned by Virus Total, it will not rescan the URL but instead will return those already existing results.
Wait time parameter will be considered only if the given URL has not been previously submitted to the VirusTotal Server. For the wait time parameter, the priority will be given to the action parameter over the asset configuration parameter.

actions.description: Upload a file to Virus Total and retrieve the analysis results
actions.verbose:
detonate file will send a file to Virus Total for analysis. Virus Total, however, takes an indefinite amount of time to complete this scan. This action will poll for the results for a short amount of time. If it cannot get the finished results in this amount of time, it will fail and in the summary it will return the scan id. This should be used with the get report action to finish the scan.
If you attempt to upload a file which has already been scanned by Virus Total, it will not rescan the file but instead will return those already existing results.
Wait time parameter will be considered only if the given file has not been previously submitted to the VirusTotal Server. For the wait time parameter, the priority will be given to the action parameter over the asset configuration parameter.

vault_id.name: vault_id
vault_id.description: The Vault ID of the file to scan
